answer:
Well, I’d have to say my favorite toy when I was little was definitely my action figure set. It was this cool collection of superheroes, you know? They had bright colors, and each one had their own special powers and accessories. The way they were designed, with those muscular bodies and detailed outfits, really captured my imagination. 

I mean, I spent hours just playing with them, creating these epic battles and adventures. I loved how each character had a unique story, and I could totally make up new ones as I went along. It was like I had my own little universe right in my room! 

As for whether I still have them, well, that’s a bit of a bummer. I actually don’t have them anymore. Somewhere along the way, they got lost or maybe donated. But, you know, every now and then, I stumble across some old pictures, and it brings back such great memories. Those toys really sparked my creativity and imagination, and I’ll always cherish those fun times! It's funny how something so simple can leave such a lasting impact on your childhood, right?
title: What was your favorite toy when you were little? What did it look like? Why did you like it? Do you still have it?
